text:
The model page at `https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B` clearly exists and is an official Meta model card. The automated checker's "author mismatch" flagging "Hugging Face" instead of "Meta" is simply because the model is *hosted* on Hugging Face but is created and owned by Meta — this is a limitation of the checker's metadata extraction, not a real authorship error. The model card itself is published under the `meta-llama` organization on Hugging Face, which is Meta's official account.

EXPLANATION: The page at the cited URL (https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B) exists and is Meta's official model card for Llama 3.2 1B; the "author mismatch" flagged by the automated checker confuses the hosting platform (Hugging Face) with the actual creator (Meta).
LINK: https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B
